age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years as on 19-06-2026. Age Relaxation for SC, ST and OBC candidates will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree/Diploma or MBBS degree from recognized university with at least 02 years of working experience in the concerned speciality
qualification.details: Anaesthesiology: PG Degree/Diploma or MBBS degree from recognized university with at least 02 years of working experience in the concerned speciality from government hospital/private hospital (not a private clinic). Preference to PG Degree or Diploma qualified candidate. faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The initial walk-in interview is scheduled for 19th June 2026. Subsequent walk-in interviews will be held on the 3rd Friday of every month until March 2027.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Senior Resident post at ESIC?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies for the Senior Resident post announced by ESIC in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PG Degree/Diploma or an MBBS degree from a recognized university along with at least 02 years of working experience in the concerned speciality.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Resident post is 45 years, as of 19th June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the ESIC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 400/-, SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 100/-, and women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the ESIC walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Patna, Bihar. The exact address and venue details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation for SC, ST, and OBC candidates will be provided as per the government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The job type for the Senior Resident post is Contractual.
